name: tuan882612
css: .tuan-card { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f0c29, #302b63, #24243e); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .tuan-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(120, 80, 255, 0.25) 0%, transparent 70%); animation: tuan-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes tuan-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.15); } } .tuan-content { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .tuan-text { font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.6rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #a78bfa, 0 0 20px #7c3aed, 0 0 40px #4f46e5; animation: tuan-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes tuan-glow { from { text-shadow: 0 0 6px #a78bfa, 0 0 14px #7c3aed, 0 0 28px #4f46e5; } to { text-shadow: 0 0 12px #c4b5fd, 0 0 28px #a78bfa, 0 0 56px #7c3aed; } } .tuan-underline { width: 60%; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #a78bfa, transparent); animation: tuan-slide 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes tuan-slide { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scaleX(0.6); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scaleX(1); } }
